behavior_in_task_description.reason: Instruction names both files (PurePanel.tsx and style/index.ts) that tests inspect.

no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction describes the bug symptom without specifying the conditional rendering or &:first-child CSS fix.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: Tests assert specific implementation patterns: test_description_spacing requires literal '&:first-child' string and test_title_conditionally_rendered requires specific regex patterns like /title\s*&&/; an alternative fix using CSS-only approach (e.g., targeting .ant-notification-notice without title class) or different conditional structure would fail.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: All TestConditionalTitleRendering, TestDescriptionSpacing, and TestLayoutBehavior tests only read source files and grep for patterns (source.includes('&:first-child'), regex on source); no actual component rendering or behavior execution.

test_not_tautological.reason: Tests require specific conditional patterns and CSS rules that a stub wouldn't satisfy without implementing the fix.

behavior_in_tests.reason: Tests cover conditional title rendering and description spacing, the two behaviors implied by the bug description.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests are grouped into TestConditionalTitleRendering, TestDescriptionSpacing, TestLayoutBehavior, and TestRepoIntegration classes with docstrings.

structured_data_schema.reason: Task is a UI component fix, not structured data output.

no_typos.reason: File paths and names are consistent and correct.

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: Instruction names the two relevant files but doesn't point to specific lines or name the fix technique.

config_edit_scope_bounded.reason: Code-only task, not a config edit task.
